content: SECTION 4.2.1: MAIN ANTERIOR BEARING WEAR. If high-frequency vibrations exceed 4.0mm/s simultaneously with a temperature rise above 740C, the main anterior bearing is likely experiencing catastrophic lubrication loss. Immediate shutdown and replacement via SAP Work Order is required to prevent a rotor explosion.

SECTION 9.1: OXYGEN TRIM FAILURE. The O2 trim system maintains thermal efficiency. If CO2 output spikes suddenly alongside a sudden drop in power output by 8%, the O2 trim servo is likely jammed in an open position and must be manually recalibrated.
